title: Terms of Use
subtitle: Rules and guidelines for using the TreinaVagaAI platform.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the TreinaVagaAI platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you should not use our services. Continued use of the platform confirms your acceptance of these terms and any future changes.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Service Description
serviceDescription.content: TreinaVagaAI is an advanced professional education and training platform that uses artificial intelligence to generate quizzes, simulations, and personalized feedback, aimed at preparing users for selection processes and career development.

userAccount.title: 3. User Account
userAccount.content: To access exclusive features, creating an account is mandatory. You are solely responsible for the security and confidentiality of your access credentials, as well as all activities that occur under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.content: You agree to use the platform ethically and legally. The following is strictly prohibited:
list: Attempting to violate or circumvent system or network security.
Using bots, scrapers, or automated scripts to collect data.
Engaging in any act of harassment, abuse, or discrimination.
Publishing content that violates intellectual property rights.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content, design, code, graphics, and features of TreinaVagaAI are the exclusive property of the platform and its licensors, protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. Unauthorized use is prohibited.

disclaimer.title: 6. Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: The service is provided 'as is', without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure. Use is at your own risk.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to review and modify these terms at any time without prior notice. We recommend that you review this page periodically to be aware of any changes.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us through the support channels available on the platform or through our customer service email.
